title: Steel Production Now Likely Exceeding Demand In China
section_path: Steel Production Now Likely Exceeding Demand In China
section_path_text: Steel Production Now Likely Exceeding Demand In China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Recent weeks have seen Chinese steel production climb even higher, with last month ending with production at the highest level since June. The most recently released data shows that daily crude steel production at large and medium-sized mills averaged 2.26 million tons during March 21 - 31. This is not only the highest level seen since June, it is also up year-on-year by 5%.
